author: gru80
description: Insert a customized or predefined time- or date-stamp at the current cursor position.
name: TimeStamper

releases.author: Gru80
releases.description:
# Release Information
Added an option in the plugin-settings to insert a linebreak after the time/date-stamp (or not)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gru80/obsidian-timestamper/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

# Installation Instructions
## Manual Installation
To manually install this plugin, download `obsidian-timestamper.zip` into the `plugins`-directory of your Obsidian vault (usually `YourVault/.obsidian/plugins`) and unzip it there.

## Installation via Plugin Browser
- Open an Obsidian vault
- Enable community plogins
- Go to "Settings" -> "Community Plugins" -> Browser
- Search for "TimeStamper" and click "Install"
releases.name: Obsidian TimeStamper v1.3.0

releases.name: Obsidian TimeStamper v1.2.0

releases.author: Gru80
releases.description:
# Release Information
Migrated from `dateformat` to `moment.js` for parsing the date/time format template string.
This is because `moment` comes with Obsidian by default already, so no extra external resource is needed any more.

See the `README.md` file in the repository root for information about which tokens can be used for formatting your time/date-stamp

# Installation Instructions
To manually install this plugin, download `obsidian-timestamper.zip` into the `plugins`-directory of your Obsidian vault (usually `YourVault/.obsidian/plugins`) and unzip it there.
releases.name: Obsidian TimeStamper v1.1.0
